_meta.policy: These items apply to ANY chosen preview — they are non-negotiable rider constraints derived from cross-panel dissent.

rider_constraints.rule: Drop-one-agent ablation MUST be in the demo video (the-researcher's contribution carries forward regardless of pick)
rider_constraints.why: Forecloses 'this is one Gemini call dressed up' objection → protects Innovation 20%

rider_constraints.rule: Each agent runs as a separate Cloud Run service with OpenTelemetry trace separation
rider_constraints.why: Architectural proof of multi-agent (judges can see service boundaries in arch diagram)

rider_constraints.rule: MCP egress allowlist — only *.rapidapi.com + *.googleapis.com. CI grep guard for unofficial-API string patterns. Pin google-cloud-aiplatform; runtime endpoint assertion.
rider_constraints.why: Prevents R1 (scraping fallback DQ) + R2 (LLM leakage DQ)

rider_constraints.rule: Demo video MUST include ONE business-case artifact (Stripe receipt OR B2B brief mockup OR cost ledger). The-indie-hacker's revenue ladder is the recommended artifact.
rider_constraints.why: Business Case 30% needs ONE concrete number on screen, not narration

rider_constraints.from: UP06 Content Designer + UP08 Brand Voice
rider_constraints.rule: Open with 발견의 즐거움 within first 8 seconds (UP-recommended cold-cut: editorial masthead → mobile install → 'why' chip surfacing)
OAuth via Google ID only (single auth path). No PII stored beyond Google sub-id + display name + last-N watch hashes. Privacy policy + DPIA stub committed to repo by D+10.
rider_constraints.why: Track 1 doesn't require enterprise auth, but global persona implies GDPR exposure

rider_constraints.rule: 30-day Gantt with cut-list at D+18, feature freeze D+25, dry-run D+27. Submit by D+29 (1 day buffer before 2026-06-05 PT).
rider_constraints.why: Submission completeness > feature richness for a hackathon judged on demo

rider_constraints.rule: Demo video uses NO third-party logos (YT/IG/TT). Use text labels only. Blur thumbnails. English audio or English subtitles only.

Submission text description leads with persona ('global content discoverer') → problem (algorithm bubble) → solution (cross-platform Curator agent) → proof (ablation + revenue). 3-sentence elevator pitch in submission first paragraph.
rider_constraints.why: Judges skim — first paragraph carries Business Case 30% weight

rider_constraints.from: TP03 Critical Reviewer + UP01 End User
rider_constraints.rule: Mockup hero scene MUST show ALL 4 agents (Curator, Search, Trend-Safety, Orchestrator) interacting with at least one MCP tool call visibly traced.
rider_constraints.why: Mandatory stack must be VISIBLY used, not just claimed

watchlist_advocates.the-community-builder: DSA/UGC liability if user picks — needs additional moderation rider
watchlist_advocates.the-embedded: Third-party host CSP/XSS risk + spec divergence (no first-party PWA)
watchlist_advocates.the-game-designer: GDPR Art.22 (automated decision-making) — needs human-override toggle
watchlist_advocates.the-slack-native: Spec divergence (PWA secondary) — needs explicit user acknowledgment
watchlist_advocates.the-anti-ai: Trade-off with judge perception of 'using ADK/Gemini' visibly — Tech 30% risk if too invisible
